RegLoan Bank — Form W-2 Wage and Tax Statement Document W2-0007 Page 1 of 1 Employee: Wei Dubois SSN: TKN-950116 Box Description Amount ($) 1 Wages, tips, other comp. 132,282 2 Federal income tax withheld 7,789 3 Social security wages 146,472 4 Social security tax withheld 4,723 5 Medicare wages and tips 32,401 6 Medicare tax withheld 2,255
